'''Tun Wala''' was a manufacturing center located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arda II]]. The [[T-6 diodem]] was manufactured here during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Its massive trade shows were visited by [[S'kytri]] who performed dramatizations of [[Initiation Hunt]]s and sold trinkets from [[Skye/Legends|Skye]].

*"[[As Long As We Live...]]" {{Reprint|As Long As We Live...}} {{1st}}
